---
title: "streamflow"
format: html
---

```{r}

library(here)
library(tidyverse)

#read in the data
data = read.csv(here("week_1/data", "p301.csv"  ))

# aggregate by water year 

p301_yearly <- data |>
  group_by(wy) |>
  summarise(total_streamflow = sum(streamflow), 
            total_precip = sum(precip),
            percent_streamflow = (total_streamflow / total_precip) * 100)

# calcualte mean, range and standard deviation of percent streamflow across 

mean(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow) 


range(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow)

sd(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow)

```

This is coming from my git
